productDisplayName: Nike Men Zoom Black Sports Shoe
description: Inspired by Kevin Durant, one of the most potent all-round Basketball players, the versatile nike Zoom KD II is loaded with material, colour and performance. Signature details on the outsole tell Durant's story and the shoes' cutting edge construction delivers excellent stability and first class comfort, while his logo marks the tongue. So every time you slip into them, remember your basketball journey has begun in style.Upper Full grain leather combined with synthetic overlays for durability and lightweight comfort Perforations on the toe box, above the tongue and the sides for maximum ventilation Lushly padded collar with textile lining for comfort Synthetic tongue with mesh upper, textile lining and Kevin Durant logo Mesh outer lining on the heel cup for snug Fit Central synthetic lacing for snug fit and to lock the foot in place Wide fit option providing the perfect feel for your feet so that you can play without distractions nike Flywire technology to minimize weight and maximize support Customisable with independent left/right personal Ids on the medial and lateral side Midsole Soft cushy footbed for ergonomic fit Phylon midsole for lightweight feel Mildly cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Features Nike Zoom technology for lightweight, low profile cushioning Rubber outsole with herringbone pattern for multi-directional traction Flex grooves for enhanced flexibility and efficient stride shoe careUse a leather brush to clean the dustApply a leather conditioner to enhance the shine
